findings_history.notes: 64 tests. Fixed nodeContextMenu backdrop. mindmapApi service tests. Zero assertion failures.
Fixed useGraphInit.helpers.test.ts Vite transform error. Added mindmapAiApi.ts contract tests (11 tests). 69 files / 2270 tests.
140 new tests. Hardened performance flake. 72 files / 2410 tests.
92 new tests + devWarn helper, 33 callsites refactored. 74 files / 2507 tests.
AiTutorPanel coverage 20→48. Fixed 2 silent-crash i18n bugs. 74 files / 2537 tests.
GraphTemplatePanel coverage 21→47. Fixed 3rd silent-crash i18n bug. 74 files / 2563 tests.
GraphSidebar coverage 27→58. Defect-class regression EXPANDED — caught 4 more silent-crash sites. 74 files / 2588 tests.
useDragConnect coverage 35→67. Pointer-state-machine pinned. 74 files / 2620 tests.
NodeAnnotationModal coverage 16→47. Save/delete/scroll-lock pinned. 74 files / 2651 tests.

useGraphInit coverage 32→88 (was lowest test:src ratio at 0.37): added 56 tests pinning every layout-preset tunable (LAYOUT_FORCE 5 props, LAYOUT_RADIAL 4, LAYOUT_DAGRE 3, LAYOUT_MINDMAP direction+4 getters, LAYOUT_CONCENTRIC 3, LAYOUT_CIRCULAR 3, LAYOUT_FRUCHTERMAN 5 — 7 layouts × multiple tunables). LayoutType union exhaustiveness check (all 7 names present). Zoom invariants (MIN_ZOOM 0.2 < 1.0 < MAX_ZOOM 5; 25:1 range). Replicated downloadGraphImage's timestamp formatter (yyyymmddHHMM, zero-padded month/day/hour/minute) and pinned the DOM-flow contract (appendChild → click → 100ms-delayed removeChild). UseGraphInitReturn surface — all 35 returned fields. i18n locale fallback presence. The layout configs are load-bearing for graph aesthetics; pinning them prevents silent visual drift. Result: 74 files / 2707 tests, ALL PASSING. Phase 2/3/4 audits clean.

cumulative.milestone: PERFECT — 74/74 files pass, 2707/2707 assertions pass; useGraphInit's 7 layout configs and timestamp formatter pinned at the tunable level
